svg.aria-label: UtilityKit: four small, focused libraries for Apple platforms. MultiCastDelegate — a type-safe, thread-safe one-to-many delegate pattern with per-subscriber queues. DependencyResolver — a thin protocol facade over Factory for registering and resolving dependencies. Coordinator — a coordinator-driven UI architecture for SwiftUI, UIKit and AppKit that routes user input to a coordinator and navigation to a view delegate. SwiftConcurrency — an OS-adaptive lock-box that selects Mutex, OSAllocatedUnfairLock or NSLock behind one protocol. Swift 6, iOS 14+, macOS and Mac Catalyst.
svg.title: UtilityKit — four focused libraries: MultiCastDelegate, DependencyResolver, Coordinator & SwiftConcurrency

g.text: Delegate · DI · Coordinator · Lock-box — Swift 6 & Sendable
4 products · import only what you need
